final:
module RefModule(output wire LED0,
            output wire LED1,
            output wire LED2,
            output wire LED3,
            output wire LED4,
            output wire LED5,
            output wire LED6,
            wire __const_{LED0, LED1, LED2, LED3, LED4, LED5, LED6, LED7} = 8'hFF;
            assign {LED0, LED1, LED2, LED3, LED4, LED5, LED6, LED7} = __const_{LED0, LED1, LED2, LED3, LED4, LED5, LED6, LED7};

endmodule
